Class TacletApp

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.TacletApp
All Implemented Interfaces:
RuleApp
Direct Known Subclasses:
NoPosTacletApp, PosTacletApp
public abstract class TacletApp extends Object implements RuleApp
A TacletApp object contains information required for a concrete application. These information may consist of
  • instantiations of the schemavariables
  • position of the find term
Its methods complete or sufficientlyComplete are used to determine if the information is complete or at least sufficient (can be completed using meta variables) complete, so that is can be applied.

    • boundAtOccurrenceSet

      protected static Set<QuantifiableVariable> boundAtOccurrenceSet(TacletPrefix prefix, SVInstantiations instantiations, @Nullable PosInOccurrence pos)
      collects all bound variables above the occurrence of the schemavariable whose prefix is given
      Parameters:
      prefix - the TacletPrefix of the schemavariable
      instantiations - the SVInstantiations so that the find(if)-expression matches
      pos - the posInOccurrence describing the position of the schemavariable
      Returns:
      set of the bound variables

    • calculateNonInstantiatedSV

      protected ImmutableSet<SchemaVariable> calculateNonInstantiatedSV()
      calculate needed SchemaVariables that have not been instantiated yet. This means to ignore SchemaVariables that appear only in addrule-sections of Taclets
      Returns:
      ImmutableSet that need to be instantiated but are not

    • calculateNonInstantiatedGenericSorts

      protected ImmutableSet<GenericSort> calculateNonInstantiatedGenericSorts()
      calculate needed GenericSorts that have not been instantiated yet. This means to ignore GenericSorts that appear only in addrule-sections of Taclets
      Returns:
      ImmutableSet that need to be instantiated but are not

    • addCheckedInstantiation

      public TacletApp addCheckedInstantiation(SchemaVariable sv, JTerm term, Services services, boolean interesting)
      creates a new Tacletapp where the SchemaVariable sv is instantiated with the given term. Sort equality is checked. If the check fails an IllegalArgumentException is thrown.
      Parameters:
      sv - the SchemaVariable to be instantiated
      term - the Term the SchemaVariable is instantiated with
      services - the services object
      interesting - whether instantiations for this schema variable should be kept in the list of "interesting" instantiations
      Returns:
      the new TacletApp

    • uninstantiatedVars

      public @NonNull ImmutableSet<SchemaVariable> uninstantiatedVars()
      returns the variables that have not yet been instantiated and need to be instantiated to apply the Taclet. (These are not all SchemaVariables like the one that appear only in the addrule sections)
      Returns:
      ImmutableSet with SchemaVariables that have not been instantiated yet

    • uninstantiatedGenericSorts

      public @NonNull ImmutableSet<GenericSort> uninstantiatedGenericSorts()
      returns the generic sorts that have not yet been instantiated and need to be instantiated to apply the Taclet. (These are not all sorts like the one that appear only in the addrule sections)
      Returns:
      ImmutableSet with GenericSorts that have not been instantiated yet

    • isInstantiationRequired

      public boolean isInstantiationRequired(SchemaVariable sv)
      returns true if the given SchemaVariable must be explicitly instantiated it does not check whether sv is already instantiated or not
      Parameters:
      sv - the SchemaVariable
      Returns:
      true if sv must be instantiated

    • tryToInstantiateAsMuchAsPossible

      public final TacletApp tryToInstantiateAsMuchAsPossible(Services services)
      Returns:
      A taclet app which is more complete than the original one (although there might still be some leftover uninstantiated variables) or null if nothing changed.

    • tryToInstantiate

      public final @Nullable TacletApp tryToInstantiate(Services services)
      Returns:
      A TacletApp with this.sufficientlyComplete() or null

    • getRealSort

      public Sort getRealSort(JOperatorSV p_sv, Services services)
      Returns:
      p_s iff p_s is not a generic sort, the concrete sort p_s is instantiated with currently otherwise
      Throws:
      GenericSortException - iff p_s is a generic sort which is not yet instantiated

    • createSkolemConstant

      public TacletApp createSkolemConstant(String instantiation, JOperatorSV sv, boolean interesting, Services services)
      Create a new constant named "instantiation" and instantiate "sv" with. This constant will later (by "createSkolemFunctions") be replaced by a function having the occurring metavariables as arguments
      Parameters:
      services - the Services class allowing access to the type model

    • createSkolemConstant

      public TacletApp createSkolemConstant(String instantiation, SchemaVariable sv, Sort sort, boolean interesting, Services services)

    • registerSkolemConstants

      public void registerSkolemConstants(Namespace<@NonNull Function> fns)
      Description copied from interface: RuleApp
      registers new Skolem functions to the provided namespace This method should be moved to the rule application logic, but remains for the moment here (checkApplicability() did also the registration before)
      Specified by:
      registerSkolemConstants in interface RuleApp
      Parameters:
      fns - the Namespace where to register the Skolem functions

    • complete

      public final boolean complete()
      returns true iff all necessary information is collected, so that the Taclet can be applied.
      Specified by:
      complete in interface RuleApp
      Returns:
      true iff all necessary information is collected, so that the Taclet can be applied.

    • addInstantiation

      public abstract TacletApp addInstantiation(SchemaVariable sv, SyntaxElement se, boolean interesting, Services services)
      adds a new instantiation to this TacletApp. This method does not check (beside some very rudimentary tests) if the instantiation is possible. If you cannot guarantee that adding the entry (sv, se) will result in a valid taclet instantiation, you have to use addCheckedInstantiation(SchemaVariable, ProgramElement, Services, boolean) instead
      Parameters:
      sv - the SchemaVariable to be instantiated
      se - the SyntaxElement the SV is instantiated with
      interesting - a boolean marking if the instantiation of this sv needs to be saved for later proof loading (interesting==true) or if it can be derived deterministically (e.g. by matching) ( interesting==false)
      Returns:
      a new taclet application equal to this one but including the newly added instantiation entry (sv, se)

    • addCheckedInstantiation

      public TacletApp addCheckedInstantiation(SchemaVariable sv, ProgramElement pe, Services services, boolean interesting)
      checks if the instantiation of sv with pe is possible. If the resulting instantiation is valid a new taclet application with an extended instantiation mapping is created and returned. Otherwise, an exception is thrown.
      Parameters:
      sv - the SchemaVariable to be instantiated
      pe - the ProgramElement the SV is instantiated with
      services - the Services
      interesting - a boolean marking if the instantiation of this sv needs to be saved for later proof loading (interesting==true) or if it can be derived deterministically (e.g. by matching) ( interesting==false)
      Returns:
      a new taclet application equal to this one but including the newly added instantiation entry (sv, pe), if the instantiation results in a valid taclet application otherwise an exception is thrown
      Throws:
      IllegalInstantiationException - exception thrown if sv cannot be instantiated with pe no matter if in general or due to side conditions posed by this particular application

    • addInstantiation

      public TacletApp addInstantiation(SchemaVariable sv, Name name, Services services)

    • addInstantiation

      public abstract TacletApp addInstantiation(SVInstantiations svi, Services services)
      creates a new Taclet application containing all the instantiations given by the SVInstantiations
      Parameters:
      svi - the SVInstantiations whose entries are the needed instantiations
      Returns:
      the new Taclet application

    • setInstantiation

      protected abstract TacletApp setInstantiation(SVInstantiations svi, Services services)
      creates a new Taclet application containing all the instantiations given by the SVInstantiations and forget the old ones
      Parameters:
      svi - the SVInstantiations whose entries are the needed instantiations
      Returns:
      the new Taclet application

    • setMatchConditions

      public abstract TacletApp setMatchConditions(MatchResultInfo mc, LogicServices services)
      creates a new Taclet application containing all the instantiations, constraints and new metavariables given by the mc object and forget the old ones

    • setAllInstantiations

      protected abstract TacletApp setAllInstantiations(MatchResultInfo mc, ImmutableList<AssumesFormulaInstantiation> ifInstantiations, Services services)
      creates a new Taclet application containing all the instantiations, constraints, new metavariables and if formula instantiations given and forget the old ones

    • setIfFormulaInstantiations

      public TacletApp setIfFormulaInstantiations(ImmutableList<AssumesFormulaInstantiation> p_list, Services p_services)
      Creates a new Taclet application by matching the given formulas against the formulas of the assumes-sequent, adding SV instantiations, constraints and metavariables as needed. This will fail if the assumes-formulas have already been instantiated.

    • findIfFormulaInstantiations

      public ImmutableList<TacletApp> findIfFormulaInstantiations(Sequent seq, Services services)
      Find all possible instantiations of the assumes-sequent formulas within the sequent "seq".
      Parameters:
      seq - uninstantiated if sequent from taclet
      services - the Services to access information about the logic signature or program model
      Returns:
      a list of tacletapps with the found assumes-formula instantiations When the IfSequent is empty, it returns a tacletapp with ifInstantiations == null instead of ifInstantiations == nil(), seemingly (LG 2022-02-07) to be more efficient.

    • setPosInOccurrence

      public PosTacletApp setPosInOccurrence(PosInOccurrence pos, Services services)
      returns a new PosTacletApp that is equal to this TacletApp except that the position is set to the given PosInOccurrence.

      CAUTION: If you call this method, consider to call NoPosTacletApp.matchFind(PosInOccurrence, LogicServices) first (if applicable) as otherwise the TacletApp may become invalid. (This happened sometimes during interactive proofs).

      Parameters:
      pos - the PosInOccurrence of the newl created PosTacletApp
      Returns:
      the new TacletApp

    • assumesInstantionsComplete

      public boolean assumesInstantionsComplete()
      Returns:
      true iff the if-instantiation list is not null or no if sequent is needed

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object o)
      compares the given Object with this one and returns true iff both are from type TacletApp with equal taclets, instantiations and positions.
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object

    • prepareUserInstantiation

      public TacletApp prepareUserInstantiation(Services services)
      checks if there are name conflicts (i.e. there are two matched bound SchemaVariable that are matched to variables with an equal name); if yes a new TacletApp is returned that equals this TacletApp except that the name conflict is resolved by replacing the instantiation of one of the conflict-causing SchemaVariables by a bound SchemaVariable with a new name; if the check is negative, the same TacletApp is returned.
      Returns:
      a conflict resolved TacletApp, remainder equal to this TacletApp

    • contextVars

      protected abstract Set<QuantifiableVariable> contextVars(SchemaVariable sv)

    • extendVarNamespaceForSV

      public Namespace<@NonNull QuantifiableVariable> extendVarNamespaceForSV(Namespace<@NonNull QuantifiableVariable> var_ns, SchemaVariable sv)
      creates a new variable namespace by adding names of the instantiations of the schema variables in the context of the given schema variable and (if the TacletApp's prefix has the context flag set) by adding names of the logic variables of the context.
      Parameters:
      var_ns - the old variable namespace
      sv - the schema variable to be considered
      Returns:
      the new created variable namespace

    • extendedFunctionNameSpace

      public Namespace<@NonNull Function> extendedFunctionNameSpace(Namespace<@NonNull Function> func_ns)
      create a new function namespace by adding all newly instantiated skolem symbols to a new namespace.
      Parameters:
      func_ns - the original function namespace, not null
      Returns:
      the new function namespace that bases on the original one

    • varSVNameConflict

      public SchemaVariable varSVNameConflict()
      returns the bound SchemaVariable that causes a name conflict (i.e. there are two matched bound SchemaVariables that are matched to variables with an equal name, the returned SchemaVariable is (an arbitrary) one of these SchemaVariables) or null if there is no such conflict
      Returns:
      null iff there is no conflict and one of the conflict-causing bound SchemaVariables

    • ifInstsCorrectSize

      public boolean ifInstsCorrectSize(ImmutableList<AssumesFormulaInstantiation> list)
      check whether the number of if instantiations is correct
      Parameters:
      list - list of instantiations (non-null)
      Returns:
      true iff the list of if instantiations has the correct size

    • ifInstsCorrectSize

      protected static boolean ifInstsCorrectSize(Taclet p_taclet, ImmutableList<AssumesFormulaInstantiation> p_list)
      only for debugging purposes; otherwise use ifInstsCorrectSize(ImmutableList)
      Returns:
      true iff the list of if instantiations has the correct size or is null

    • getProgramElement

      public ProgramElement getProgramElement(String instantiation, ProgramSV sv, Services services)

    • checkVarCondNotFreeIn

      protected static boolean checkVarCondNotFreeIn(Taclet taclet, SVInstantiations instantiations, @Nullable PosInOccurrence pos)
      checks if the variable conditions of type 'x not free in y' are hold by the found instantiations. The variable conditions is used implicit in the prefix. (Used to calculate the prefix)
      Parameters:
      taclet - the Taclet that is tried to be instantiated. A match for the find (or/and assumes) has been found.
      instantiations - the SVInstantiations so that the find expression or assumes sequent matches
      pos - the PosInOccurrence where the Taclet is applied or null if the taclet has no find
      Returns:
      true iff all variable conditions x not free in y are hold

    • collectBoundVarsAbove

      protected static Set<QuantifiableVariable> collectBoundVarsAbove(PosInOccurrence pos)
      collects all bound vars that are bound above the subterm described by the given term position information
      Parameters:
      pos - the PosInOccurrence describing a subterm in Term
      Returns:
      a set of logic variables that are bound above the specified subterm
